§6Saw Blade Components§f:
The §6Saw Blade Assembly §f(advancedrocketry:sawblade) is a §ecomponent item §f for the §6Cutting Machine§f. It is a §bprecision tool §f that performs §6cutting operations §f on ingots and plates.

§6Production Path (recipes/sawblade.json)§f:
Pattern "s s / pbp / p p":
- §bs§f: §6Iron Stick §f(stickIron) — 4 (top middle + middle top + middle bottom + bottom middle)
- §bp§f: §6Iron Plate §f(plateIron) — 4 (top left + top right + bottom left + bottom right)
- §bb§f: §6Iron Saw Blade §f(advancedrocketry:sawbladeiron) — 1 (centre)
- Yields 1× Saw Blade Assembly

The §6Iron Saw Blade §f itself (advancedrocketry:sawbladeiron) is crafted via recipes/sawbladeiron.json:
- Pattern " s / sps / s " with §6Iron Stick §f (4) and §6Iron Plate §f (1, centre)
- Yields 1× Iron Saw Blade

§6Function§f:
- §bConsumable tool §f: the Saw Blade has §b250 §fuses
- §bUsed in §f: §6Cutting Machine §f to perform §6ingot-to-plate §f or §6block-to-plate §f operations
- §bStack size §f: 1
- §bNo power requirement §f
- §bReplaceable §f: damaged Saw Blades can be §breplaced §f in the §6Cutting Machine §f GUI

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 13 items the Saw Blade is a component of, including:
- §6Cutting Machine §f(advancedrocketry:cuttingmachine)
- §6Precision Assembling Machine §f(uses Saw Blades in §bcutting recipes §f)

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: keep a §6stock of Saw Blades §f in a §6chest §f next to your §6Cutting Machine §f
- §eTip§f: a §6Diamond Saw Blade §f variant lasts longer but costs more
- §cWarning§f: a §bdamaged §f Saw Blade will §cdestroy §f items instead of cutting them — replace before §b§e0%§f
- §cWarning§f: Saw Blades are §cnot §f interchangeable between modded cutting machines
